description: EnvZ-OmpR from EcoCyc: sensor kinase, response regulator, porin genes (ompF, ompC), and micF antisense RNA. OmpR~P represses ompF and activates ompC; OmpR represses micF; micF represses ompF.
name: EnvZ-OmpR (EcoCyc-sourced)
notes: V4 = EcoCyc only. EnvZ-OmpR two-component system, ompF/ompC, micF from EcoCyc annotations.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ENVZ[EnvZ]
    OMPR[OmpR]
    OMPF[ompF]
    OMPC[ompC]
    MICF[micF]
    ENVZ -->|phosphotransfer| OMPR
    OMPR -->|represses| OMPF
    OMPR -->|activates| OMPC
    OMPR -->|represses| MICF
    MICF -->|represses translation| OMPF
    style ENVZ fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPR fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style OMPC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style MICF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From EcoCyc EnvZ-OmpR and porin annotations; micF regulatory RNA.

sources.title: EcoCyc
sources.note: E. coli two-component systems, ompF/ompC, micF.
